detail.description:
“Make a cute pink pen for my bestie!"
"Wow…! Your deco pens are so pretty! That’s skill!”

Deco Pen ASMR Live Start!
What kind of pen will we create today? Stack glossy pearls, soft ribbons, and a tiny kitty tucked in a heart frame… So dreamy!

From your cozy desk, filled with cute trinkets, go from 0 subscribers to 1 million views on your first livestream! Your deco creator journey begins here!

[ Pick Your Beads ]
Shimmering beads pour out like tiny jewels!
Tap and scoop your faves!

[ Decorat
detail.recentChanges:
Tap, scoop, sparkle! Make your own perfect deco pen!
- No need for a craft store! Unlimited deco fun, right at home!
- Start from your desk filled with trinkets, twinkling beads, and ASMR delights!
- What theme will you pick? Pink? Cute? Dreamy?
- Stack up heart beads, angel wings, and even kitty charms…!
- Ta-da! Your custom deco pen is complete!
- Click, snap! Show off your masterpiece as comments pour in!
- Oh? From shining dolphins to twinkling moons…! Unlock new beads and keep creating!!
